title: Statistiques quotidiennes
description: Afficher les modifications quotidiennes des données commerciales pour les utilisateurs, les crédits et les commandes

funnel.title: Signup Cohort Funnel
funnel.description: Each row tracks users who signed up on that day and how far they later progressed from first successful generation to checkout and paid.

acquisition.title: Acquisition Breakdown
acquisition.description: Group signup cohorts by campaign, ad group, workflow, and match type so you can see which acquisition slices actually move users toward paid.
acquisition.empty: No attributed signups in this period yet.

tuning.title: Cold Start Tuning
tuning.description: Compare signup cohorts by country, language, and device so you can decide which slices to lean into, cap, or pause during account cold start.
tuning.empty: No signup data for this tuning view yet.
